front: Painting: large nude self-portrait with the artist perched atop a wooden post; mirror-written text from Luce Irigaray carved into the paint
Painting: monumental 9-by-21-foot triptych (South Face, Front Face, North Face) of a woman in white lingerie; appeared on the cover of Manic Street Preachers' The Holy Bible
back: Strategy (South Face, Front Face, North Face) (Jenny Saville)

front: Artist: Young British Artist known for large-scale paintings of nude, obese women; work often compared to Lucian Freud's
Artist: YBA painter featured in Saatchi's 1997 Sensation exhibition alongside Rachel Whiteread and Tracey Emin
